name: Engage Messaging Twilio
description: This is an Engage specific action to send an SMS and Whatsapp messages using Twilio API

webhookUrl.label: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Webhook URL that will receive all events for the sent message

twilioHostname.label: Twilio host name
twilioHostname.description: Overrides the default Twilio host name used mainly for testing without having to send real messages.

connectionOverrides.label: Connection Overrides
connectionOverrides.description: Connection overrides are configuration supported by twilio webhook services. Must be passed as fragments on the callback url

region.label: Region
region.description: The region where the message is originating from

toNumber.label: Test Number
toNumber.description: Number to send SMS to when testing

from.label: From
from.description: The Twilio Phone Number, Short Code, or Messaging Service to send SMS from.

contentSid.label: SMS content template SID
contentSid.description: Content template SID for Twilio Content API

customArgs.label: Custom Arguments
customArgs.description: Additional custom arguments that will be opaquely sent back on webhook events

connectionOverrides.label: Connection Overrides
connectionOverrides.description: Connection overrides are configuration supported by twilio webhook services. Must be passed as fragments on the callback url

send.label: Send Message
send.description: Whether or not the message should actually get sent.

traitEnrichment.label: Trait Enrich
traitEnrichment.description: Whether or not trait enrich from event (i.e without profile api call)

sendBasedOnOptOut.label: Send OptOut
sendBasedOnOptOut.description: Send to any subscription status other than unsubscribed

externalIds.label: External IDs
externalIds.description: An array of user profile identity information.

id.label: ID
id.description: A unique identifier for the collection.

channelType.label: type
channelType.description: The external ID contact channel type (SMS, WHATSAPP, etc).

subscriptionStatus.label: ID
subscriptionStatus.description: The subscription status for the identity.

eventOccurredTS.label: Event Timestamp
eventOccurredTS.description: Time of when the actual event happened.

contentSid.label: WhatsApp template Content Sid
contentSid.description: The template you sending through WhatsApp

contentVariables.label: WhatsApp template variables
contentVariables.description: Content personalization variables/merge tags for your WhatsApp message

toNumber.label: Test Number
toNumber.description: Number to send WhatsApp to when testing

from.label: From
from.description: The Twilio Phone Number, Short Code, or Messaging Service to send WhatsApp from.

customArgs.label: Custom Arguments
customArgs.description: Additional custom arguments that will be opaquely sent back on webhook events

connectionOverrides.label: Connection Overrides
connectionOverrides.description: Connection overrides are configuration supported by twilio webhook services. Must be passed as fragments on the callback url

send.label: Send Message
send.description: Whether or not the message should actually get sent.

traitEnrichment.label: Trait Enrich
traitEnrichment.description: Whether or not trait enrich from event (i.e without profile api call)

externalIds.label: External IDs
externalIds.description: An array of user profile identity information.

id.label: ID
id.description: A unique identifier for the collection.

channelType.label: type
channelType.description: The external ID contact channel type (SMS, WHATSAPP, etc).

subscriptionStatus.label: ID
subscriptionStatus.description: The subscription status for the identity.

eventOccurredTS.label: Event Timestamp
eventOccurredTS.description: Time of when the actual event happened.

sendMobilePush.title: Send Mobile Push Notification
sendMobilePush.description: Send a push notification to a mobile device using Twilio

from.label: From
from.description: The Push Service Sid to send the push notification from.

title.label: Notification title
title.description: The title to be displayed for your notification

body.label: Notification body
body.description: The body to be displayed for your notification

tapAction.label: Notification open action
tapAction.description: Sets the notification click action/category: open_app, open_url, deep_link, or a custom string

link.label: Notification Link
link.description: Deep link or URL to navigate to when the notification is tapped

sound.label: Notification sound
sound.description: Sets the sound played when the notification arrives

priority.label: Notification priority
priority.description: Sets the priority of the message

badgeAmount.label: Badge amount
badgeAmount.description: The badge count which is used in combination with badge strategy to determine the final badge

badgeStrategy.label: Badge strategy
badgeStrategy.description: Sets the badge count strategy in the notification

ttl.label: Time to live
ttl.description: Sets the time to live for the notification

tapActionButtons.label: Tap action buttons
tapActionButtons.description: Sets the buttons to show when interacting with a notification

onTap.label: Tap action
onTap.description: The action to perform when this button is tapped: open_app, open_url, deep_link, or a custom string

link.label: Link
link.description: Deep link or URL to navigate to when this button is tapped

customArgs.label: Custom Arguments
customArgs.description: Additional custom arguments that will be opaquely sent back on webhook events

connectionOverrides.label: Connection Overrides
connectionOverrides.description: Connection overrides are configuration supported by twilio webhook services. Must be passed as fragments on the callback url

send.label: Send Notification
send.description: Whether or not the notification should actually get sent.

externalIds.label: External IDs
externalIds.description: An array of user profile identity information.

id.label: ID
id.description: A unique identifier for the collection.

channelType.label: type
channelType.description: The external ID contact channel type (SMS, WHATSAPP, etc).

subscriptionStatus.label: ID
subscriptionStatus.description: The subscription status for the identity.

eventOccurredTS.label: Event Timestamp
eventOccurredTS.description: Time of when the actual event happened.
